response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience but lacks the core requirements for this role. C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago (2014-2015), far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++. There is no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain background. Skills listed center on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile work — a mismatch for a C++ fixed-income consulting engagement.
strengths: Senior-level engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Polyglot background including some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015), well below the required 5-10 years
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform skills
